s1_p1: Content Intelligence App is operated by Andrés Pérez Díaz, a Colombian citizen. We are committed to protecting your personal information and being transparent about how we use it.
s2_direct_li1: Email address — used for account creation and communications
s2_direct_li2: Password — stored securely and encrypted by our authentication provider
s2_direct_li3: Content data — ideas, topics, content records, and descriptions you create in the App
s2_direct_li4: Profile information — optional fields provided during onboarding
s2_auto_li1: Usage data — which features you use, how often you generate briefs or reports, download events
s2_auto_li2: Session data — login timestamps and session information
s2_not_li1: Payment or financial information (the Service is currently free)
s2_not_li4: Data from minors (the Service is restricted to users 18 and older)
s3_li2: Generate AI-powered creative briefs and reports personalized to your content patterns
s3_li4: Analyze aggregated, anonymized usage trends to improve the platform
s3_li5: Maintain the security and integrity of the Service
s3_not_intro: We do not use your information to:
s3_not_li1: Sell or share with third-party advertisers
s3_not_li3: Create individual profiles for advertising purposes
s4_intro: We use the following trusted third-party services:
s4_li1: Supabase — Database, authentication, and backend infrastructure
s4_li2: Anthropic (Claude API) — AI-powered brief and report generation
s4_note: Your data is not shared with any other third parties.
s5_p1: When you generate a brief or creative report, your content patterns are sent to Anthropic's Claude API to generate a personalized response. This data is processed in real time and is not retained by Anthropic for training purposes under their standard API terms.
s6_p1: Your data is stored in Supabase's infrastructure with Row Level Security (RLS), encrypted connections (HTTPS/TLS), and hashed passwords. We implement reasonable security measures but cannot guarantee absolute security.
s7_p1: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, your personal profile and content data will be deleted within 30 days. Anonymized, aggregated data may be retained for platform analytics.
s8_p1: Under Colombian data protection law (Ley 1581 de 2012), you have the right to access, correct, delete, and export your personal data, and to object to specific uses. Contact us at
s8_p2: and we will respond within 15 business days.
s9_p1: The App uses only essential session cookies necessary for authentication. We do not use advertising cookies, tracking pixels, or third-party analytics cookies.
s10_p1: This Service is not directed to individuals under 18 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors.
s11_p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify registered users by email of any significant changes.
